erm anyone knows any team suggestions for mouchette 🌚

Aigis,Helot,Thais, Mouchette 

Only Helot is must have others can be change accordingly
Thanks but i have another question, what can Helot do for that team?
She has exalt that can draw strike card

The only strike support in game currently iirc

-exalt strike buff
-lasting loathe help with mouchette draw her card to hand
-some bleed
-hand size increases 
-most of helot is card is consider as a strike that can help trigger mouch FuA

And also very little investment needed 
-e0 is enough 
-her WoD is not needed
-you only need to upgrade her exalt, you can also upgrade her def card too for little survivability
I'd say that you can consider raising her Lasting Loathe as well, as it's Level is tied to what Level the Base Strikes that she'll randomly pick up are
If your Lasting Loathe is Level 3, your Lasting Loathe will pick up Level 3 Base Strikes
For example:

Yes

Handsize WoDs are generally always recommended to pick up, what seperates Thais WoD from the rest though is that it will also generate lots of Keyflare on Turn End for you on top providing flat Aliemus to all Awakeners on every Posse Cast
It's also really helpful on Caro Teams as it will also help you generate more Embryo Fusion
